intro: Do you think this law actually exists?
description:
There are laws around the world that are hard to believe.

"There's no way that law exists!"
"Actually, that sounds like it could be real..."
This quiz will test your common sense and intuition.

This game is a true-or-false quiz based on unique laws that actually exist (or once existed) in countries around the world.

From laws that make you laugh out loud to ones that are surprisingly reasonable, you'll face quiz questions about the world's most unusual laws.

How to play is simple.
・Read the law
・Choose True or False by intuition
・Understand instantly with results and explanations

Even when you're right, you'll be surprised: "That's really a law?!"
Even when you're wrong, you'll enjoy it: "That law actually exists?!"

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for passing time or finding fun conversation topics.

Can your common sense handle the world's laws?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
